name: RMW - AK74M
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - Previously the Service Rifle of the Russian Ground Forces. But still sees some amount of service today. Originally designed by the legendary Mikhail Kalashinkov, the M variant sports polymer furtniture and better accuracy. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
